title: San Millán 80/20 Session
description: 80% Z2 + 20% hard finish — San Millán's personal protocol
purpose: Aerobic base with high-intensity finish for time-efficient fitness

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 70%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 70% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 10:00 at 70%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 70% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Slow down. Yes, slower. 85-95 rpm, Seated. Your aerobic system is thanking you.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 60:00 at 75%. Conversational pace — should be able to talk in full sentences.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 10% done. 25 minutes left. Not every workout needs to hurt. This is smart training.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 75% for 60:00. So easy you could do this all day. (Please don't.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 75%, 85-95 rpm, Seated. Base miles. The work no one sees but everyone needs.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 1/1. The discomfort is the adaptation. Embrace it. 2 more blocks to build FTP.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 1/1. 73% complete. Hold 100% steady. 20 minutes remain.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 73% complete. Block 1/1. This is where mediocre riders crack. You're pushing through.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Only 20 more minutes of this very special kind of suffering. Define 'only.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 1/1. Comfortably hard. Breathe deep. Trust the process.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 3/4. You're 78% done. This is where average athletes quit. You're not average.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 3/4. 1 to go. You've accumulated 65min of supra-threshold work. Stay sharp on form.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 1 reps left. 17 minutes total. Your competition quit 20 minutes ago. You're still here.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 78% done. Your legs are questioning your life choices. Tell them to shut up.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 3/4. You've accumulated 65min of hard work. Quality over quantity from here.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Last threshold block. 98% FTP. One more step toward crushing your old FTP. Worth it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final threshold block: 7:00 at 98%. Then 10min easy. Hold power steady.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last threshold block. Then 10min easy. Make this one count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Last one. Then 10min to contemplate your life choices. 98% FTP.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last threshold interval. 98% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 89% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 75min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 89% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 85 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
